items.title: Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing and Hunting
items.description: Sector covering establishments that grow crops, raise animals, harvest timber, and harvest fish and other animals.

items.title: Crop Production
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in growing crops, plants, vines, or trees and their seeds.

items.title: Soybean Farming
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in growing soybeans.

items.title: Animal Production and Aquaculture
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in raising or fattening animals and aquaculture.

items.title: Construction
items.description: Sector covering establishments primarily engaged in the construction of buildings and engineering projects.

items.title: Commercial and Institutional Building Construction
items.description: Establishments primarily responsible for the construction of commercial and institutional buildings.

items.title: Electrical Contractors and Other Wiring Installation Contractors
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in installing and servicing electrical wiring and equipment.

items.title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in installing and servicing plumbing, heating, and air-conditioning equipment.

items.title: Food Manufacturing
items.description: Establishments that transform livestock and agricultural products into products for intermediate or final consumption.

items.title: Electronic Computer Manufacturing
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in manufacturing and assembling electronic computers, such as mainframes, personal computers, and laptops.

items.title: Information
items.description: Sector covering establishments that produce and distribute information and cultural products and process data.

items.title: Software Publishers
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in computer software publishing or publishing and reproduction.

items.title: Computing Infrastructure Providers, Data Processing, Web Hosting, and Related Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing computing infrastructure, data processing services, web hosting, and related services.

items.title: Finance and Insurance
items.description: Sector covering establishments primarily engaged in financial transactions and facilitating such transactions.

items.title: Commercial Banking
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in accepting demand and other deposits and making commercial, industrial, and consumer loans.

items.title: Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
items.description: Sector covering establishments that specialize in performing professional, scientific, and technical activities for others.

items.title: Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
items.description: Subsector for establishments engaged in professional, scientific, and technical services such as legal, accounting, engineering, and computer services.

items.title: Computer Systems Design and Related Services
items.description: Industry group of establishments primarily engaged in providing expertise in the field of information technologies.

items.title: Offices of Lawyers
items.description: Establishments of legal practitioners known as lawyers or attorneys primarily engaged in the practice of law.

items.title: Offices of Certified Public Accountants
items.description: Establishments of accountants who are certified public accountants (CPAs) primarily engaged in providing accounting services.

items.title: Payroll Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in collecting payroll information and producing payroll checks, reports, and tax filings.

items.title: Engineering Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in applying physical laws and principles of engineering in the design, development, and utilization of machines, materials, and processes.

items.title: Custom Computer Programming Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in writing, modifying, testing, and supporting software to meet the needs of a particular customer.

items.title: Computer Systems Design Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in planning and designing computer systems that integrate hardware, software, and communication technologies.

items.title: Computer Facilities Management Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing on-site management and operation of clients' computer systems and data processing facilities.

items.title: Other Computer Related Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing computer related services (except custom programming, systems design, and facilities management).

items.title: Administrative Management and General Management Consulting Services
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing operating advice and assistance on administrative and general management issues.

items.title: Health Care and Social Assistance
items.description: Sector covering establishments providing health care and social assistance for individuals.

items.title: Offices of Physicians (except Mental Health Specialists)
items.description: Establishments of health practitioners having the degree of M.D. or D.O. primarily engaged in the independent practice of general or specialized medicine.

items.title: Full-Service Restaurants
items.description: Establishments primarily engaged in providing food services to patrons who order and are served while seated and pay after eating.
